name: Marcus Chen
bio: Old roommate from sophomore year. Currently working as a backend dev. We usually catch up over League of Legends.

name: Sarah Jenkins
bio: Fellow photography enthusiast. We try to go on a local photo walk at least once a month. She's great at street portraits.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: Best friend from high school. She travels a lot for work now, so we have to be intentional about scheduling video calls.

name: David Miller
bio: Lifting partner from the neighborhood gym. Keeps me accountable on leg days. Super into marathon training.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Former manager who became a mentor. Always gives the best career advice. Need to reach out for a coffee catch-up.

name: Jordan Smith
bio: Grew up on the same street. We share hiking trail recommendations and occasionally go camping in the summers.

name: Amina Okafor
bio: Met through a local writing workshop. She's working on a sci-fi novel. We exchange manuscript feedback.

name: Leo Vance
bio: Met in university hiking club. We're planning a trip to Zion National Park next year. Expert at navigation.

name: Chloe Thompson
bio: Fellow vinyl collector. We usually attend at least three jazz shows a year. She has an incredible ear for music.

name: Samir Gupta
bio: Met in Econ 101. Now he works in wealth management. We talk markets and personal finance once a month.

name: Becca Lowe
bio: Member of the community garden. She taught me how to prune tomatoes properly. Haven't seen her since last season.

name: Hiroshi Tanaka
bio: Design consultant living in Tokyo. We met at a conference. We exchange inspiration links and industry news.
